narrative:
Cambridge Township has 8,168 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a clear Republican lean of 10.4 percentage points.
